claim: The study compares BLIP-2 generative and BLIP-2 contrastive-enhanced alignment under the same ScienceQA setting.
Qwen2-VL answer-only, rationale-generative, and explanation-aware controls are separated on ScienceQA and A-OKVQA.
claim_strength: direct controlled comparison when all expected runs are current

claim: Answer-only adapters do not receive gold rationale targets, while rationale adapters train on reasoning plus answer.
Length-aware alpha is audited as token-weighted rationale CE, while the fixed-alpha sweep remains an ablation.
ChartQA, DocVQA, and VQAv2 rows are answer-only fallback/domain rows, not rationale-supervised explanation-aware rows.
Masking drift measures evidence sensitivity and should not be described as proof that rationales are faithful.
claim_strength: diagnostic, not causal proof of rationale text

claim: The scale comparison is Qwen2-VL-2B vs Qwen2-VL-7B under the selected explanation-aware QLoRA setup.
Transfer is evaluated by applying each source-domain adapter to target domains while preserving the adapter prompt family.
